title: christella × intermedia
intro: Christella × intermedia, also known as the intermediate christella, is a hybrid fern species within the family Thelypteridaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are believed to contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Christella × intermedia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and may also be dried and used in tinctures or capsules for medicinal purposes.
